generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T NAPHTHA. Authority. Lancet, 1856 (2), p. 230, G. H., æt. twelve years, drank some. ► Insensible. ► Eyes had a glassy appearance, and pupils were much contracted. ► Countenance sallow. ► Frothing at the mouth. ► Gasping for breath. ► Complete loss of muscular power. ► Skin clammy.
